summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of V6 package updates + premium UI upgrades. All 15 features tested and verified. HomeScreen V6 displays correctly with reordered tiles (premium + highest intent first), gradient background, category modules with helper copy, premium CTA area, and trust microcopy. Landing Page V6 (Frame 27 layout) displays correctly with topic explainer, personalized greeting, Recommended badge ONLY on tier selector tabs, exact 'Unlimited chat' wording, 'How will your journey unfold' copy, refund after tier summary, simplified sticky bar, and 'Coming soon' for remedies.
critical_code_review_comments: All V6 HomeScreen features implemented correctly
All V6 Landing Page features implemented correctly

Tile order matches V6 spec exactly (Love: Healing/Dating/Marriage/Trust/Family/Closure, Career: Clarity/Job Change/Money/Timing/Work Stress/Office, Health: Stress/Sleep/Energy/Healing/Emotional/Wellness)
Category modules have correct helper copy
Gradient background applied correctly (linear-gradient from #F8FAF9 to #E8F0ED)
CTA area has 'Talk to Expert' as PRIMARY (teal rgb(62,130,122)) and 'Chat with Mira (AI)' as SECONDARY (white)
Trust microcopy 'Private • No spam • Verified experts' displayed correctly
Recommended badge ONLY on 'Supported' tier selector tab (not on tier summary card)
Sticky bar shows ONLY Price + 'Start my journey' button (no Recommended badge, no weeks, no package name, no secure payments)
'How will your journey unfold' exact wording used (not 'How will it unfold?')
Remedies CTA shows 'Coming soon' (not 'Add to journey')
Refund guarantee appears ONLY after tier summary
context_for_next_testing_agent: V6 premium UI upgrades fully tested. Key test selectors: tile-{id} for all 18 tiles, talk-to-expert-btn, chat-with-mira-btn, tier-tab-{tier}, tier-summary-card, sticky-cta-bar, start-journey-btn. Login with any email and set localStorage 'niro_onboarding_completed'='true' to skip onboarding. All tiles navigate to TopicLandingPage correctly with V6 content.

homescreen_tile_order_love.details: Love tiles in correct order: Healing, Dating, Marriage, Trust, Family, Closure

homescreen_tile_order_career.details: Career tiles in correct order: Clarity, Job Change, Money, Timing, Work Stress, Office

homescreen_tile_order_health.details: Health tiles in correct order: Stress, Sleep, Energy, Healing, Emotional, Wellness

homescreen_helper_copy.details: All 3 categories have helper copy: Love='Dating, commitment, healing, family dynamics', Career='Work direction, stability, timing, growth', Health='Stress, recovery, energy, emotional balance'

homescreen_gradient_background.details: Gradient background applied: linear-gradient(rgb(248, 250, 249) 0%, rgb(240, 245, 243) 50%, rgb(232, 240, 237) 100%)

homescreen_cta_area.details: 'Talk to Expert' is PRIMARY (teal rgb(62,130,122), white text), 'Chat with Mira (AI)' is SECONDARY (white background, dark text)

homescreen_trust_microcopy.details: 'Private • No spam • Verified experts' displayed under CTAs

landing_topic_explainer.details: Topic explainer 1-liner at top: 'Closure, emotional stability, and what changes next.'

landing_hero_greeting.details: Hero greeting uses 'Hi {name}, here are the paths you can choose for your journey' format (shows 'there' when no name)

landing_recommended_badge_tabs.details: 'Recommended' badge ONLY on 'Supported' tier selector tab

landing_tier_summary_no_badge.details: Tier summary card does NOT show 'Recommended' badge

landing_refund_after_summary.details: Refund guarantee 'No questions asked — 7 day full refund guarantee' appears ONLY after tier summary

landing_journey_unfold_copy.details: Section title is exactly 'How will your journey unfold' (not 'How will it unfold?')

landing_unlimited_chat_wording.details: Chat wording is exactly 'Unlimited chat' (not 'async chat')

landing_remedies_coming_soon.details: Remedies CTA shows 'Coming soon' (not 'Add to journey')

landing_sticky_bar_simplified.details: Sticky bar shows ONLY Price (₹10,999) + 'Start my journey' button (no Recommended badge, no weeks/package name, no secure payments text)
